title: Maps, Strings, Bytes, Runes, Unicode, and Deterministic Results · Execution Trace: Deterministic Map Output
summary: An incident summarizer must count labels, normalize text, preserve UTF-8, and publish stable output despite unordered maps. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go deterministic map output increment in a Unicode-safe deterministic incident summarizer. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Produce stable map-derived output by extracting and sorting keys under a documented comparison rule.
Decode UTF-8 with range and unicode/utf8 while handling byte indexes, replacement runes, invalid input, and grapheme limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
